description: Every Daraz product search, plus a local price database, real-deal ranking, and drop alerts no Daraz scraper has.

novel_features.name: Price history
novel_features.description: See a product's recorded price trend and its lowest-ever price from your local store.

novel_features.name: Price watch
novel_features.description: Record current prices for every item matching a search into the local store so price history builds over time.

novel_features.name: Saved-search change alerts
novel_features.description: Diff a saved search against its last local snapshot to show new listings and price moves since you last checked.

novel_features.name: Real-deal ranking
novel_features.description: Rank a search by a composite of discount, rating, and units sold to surface genuinely good deals.

novel_features.name: Fake-discount / value detector
novel_features.description: Flag inflated original-price discounts by comparing each item's claimed original price to the local median for that query.

novel_features.name: Cross-seller compare
novel_features.description: Find the same item across sellers and show the cheapest and best-rated side by side.

novel_features.name: Seller scorecard
novel_features.description: Aggregate a seller's catalog from the local store: average rating, price range, listing count, discount pattern.
